# A New Blog, New Job, and ()

(Intro, sections, photos, book club?)

(Intro) Hello! Welcome to the very first of many blog posts

These first few weeks will be a sort of test run before I head off to the UK in September, so expect format and content to change every week until then as I work out the kinks.

July 19th 2026

I officially began my summer job as a production assistant for Early Music Vancouver (EMV) today, met the cast of Orfeo.

I mainly was in charge of providing refreshments, though I will have more duties later on.

I tried to watch the World Cup final during my lunch break but the only place on UBC to watch it was fully booked, so I ultimately had to rely on iShowSpeed's livestream to get a picture of the mattch (though I did manage to see Spain's winning goal)

July 20th 2026

Book Club:

I started reading **Values** by Mark Carney a few weeks ago. I want to understand the direction Canada is headed in, and where better to start? Att least he has a plan, even if I disagree with some parts of it.
